news.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
news.summary: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

news.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
news.summary: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

news.title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted
news.summary: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.

news.title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
news.summary: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

news.title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
news.summary: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that it is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

news.title: OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
news.summary: OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. news.title: Yarbo says it will remove the intentional backdoor from its robot lawn mower
news.summary: The company behind the robot lawn mower that ran me over has changed its tune. Yarbo now plans to completely remove the remote backdoor access that could have let bad actors reprogram the robot over the internet. news.title: Here’s what Mira Murati’s AI company is up to
news.summary: Thinking Machines, the AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, announced Monday that it's working on something called "interaction models." news.title: Govee’s new portable smart lamp is on sale for the first time
news.summary: If you’ve always liked the idea of the Philips Hue Go portable lamp but couldn’t justify the $100+ price tag, Govee recently released a much cheaper alternative, the Govee Table Lamp Classic, and it’s already receiving its first discount. news.title: Audi has a new Q9 flagship coming soon: Here's its interior
news.summary: Audi made sure to consult American tastes for its first full-size SUV.

news.title: After banning foreign routers, FCC says existing ones can get updates until 2029
news.summary: FCC extends waiver allowing routers and drones to get patches for two more years.

news.summary: Can AI save us from the AI industry’s endless thirst for water? Outlook not so good.

news.title: Passengers from hantavirus ship arrive in US; 3 people in biocontainment
news.summary: A US passenger tested "mildly positive," but WHO is calling it "inconclusive" for now.

news.title: Ilya Sutskever Stands by His Role in Sam Altman’s OpenAI Ouster: ‘I Didn’t Want It to Be Destroyed’
news.summary: The former OpenAI chief scientist may be estranged from the company, but he still came to its defense as he testified on Monday.

news.title: Testing for ‘Bad Cholesterol’ Doesn’t Tell the Whole Story
news.summary: There’s a more accurate way of measuring who’s at risk for cholesterol-related health issues. So why don’t more doctors use it?

news.title: The FCC Received Hundreds of Complaints About Bad Bunny’s ‘Vulgar’ Super Bowl Performance
news.summary: The complaints, obtained by WIRED, described Bad Bunny’s performance as being overly sexual and protested that the show was in Spanish.

news.title: There’s an Unhinged New Video Game About Trump and the Iran War
news.summary: The game, developed by the group of anonymous artists known as Secret Handshake, is available online and in person in Washington, DC.

news.title: A New Hantavirus Vaccine Is in the Works
news.summary: Since 2023, Moderna and Korea University have been developing a new mRNA vaccine for hantavirus. The work has been promising so far, but a finished product isn't likely coming any time soon.
